PreToolUse.description: Context7: Auto-fetch docs before using any framework/library

hooks.command: echo 'Reminder: Use Context7 MCP to fetch latest docs before implementing'

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; ext="${filepath##*.}"; case "$ext" in ts|tsx|js|jsx) npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; npx eslint --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; npx tsc --noEmit 2>/dev/null | head -20 ;; py) ruff format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; pyright "$filepath" 2>/dev/null | head -20 ;; swift) swift format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; go) gofmt -w "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; dart) dart format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; echo 'Quality check complete'

PostToolUse.description: TDD reminder: Check if test exists for edited file

hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$filepath" | grep -qvE '(\.test\.|_test\.|spec\.|__tests__|test_)'; then dir=$(dirname "$filepath"); base=$(basename "$filepath" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//'); found=0; for pattern in "${dir}/${base}.test.*" "${dir}/${base}_test.*" "${dir}/${base}.spec.*" "${dir}/__tests__/${base}.*"; do ls $pattern 2>/dev/null && found=1; done; if [ $found -eq 0 ]; then echo "WARNING: No test file found for $filepath. TDD requires tests first!"; fi; fi

PreCompact.description: Save state before compaction (Pilot + Compound style)

hooks.command: echo '--- PRE-COMPACT STATE ---'; echo 'Active tasks:'; cat .planning/STATE.md 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'No GSD state'; echo '---'; ls docs/plans/*.md 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || echo 'No Compound plans'; echo '--- END STATE ---'

Stop.description: Remind to compound knowledge before stopping

hooks.command: echo 'Reminder: Run /ce:compound to save learnings before ending session'
